name: pulse
description: Pulse: validate-first agentic development ecosystem for planning, validation, swarming, and execution

interface.shortDescription: Validate-first skills for agentic software delivery
interface.longDescription: Bundles the Pulse workflow skills and standalone utilities for planning, validation, swarming, review, and learning capture.
defaultPrompt: Onboard this repository for Pulse and start with using-pulse.
Plan and validate a feature before we write code.
Run a review and compounding pass on completed work.
